The salvation of the world lies in the human heart.
It's not what you say out of your mouth that determines your life, it's what you whisper to yourself that has the most power!
I'm not afraid of death, but I'm in no hurry to die.
The least deviation from truth will be multiplied later.
Always do what is right. It will gratify half of mankind and astound the other.
Wrong turns are as important as right turns. More important, sometimes.
Failure is just information and an opportunity to change your course.
Without the rain there would be no rainbow.
The joy of life comes from our encounters with new experiences.
Never to suffer would never to have been blessed.
No great discovery was ever made without a bold guess.
Be grateful for what you have now, and nothing should be taken for granted.
Not doing it is certainly the best way to not getting it.
When uncomfortable, my instinct is not to avoid the discomfort but to become at peace with it.
If no one ever broke the rules, then we'd never advance.
Still your waters.
An intelligent person hires people who are more intelligent than he is.
A wise man will be master of his mind, a fool will be its slave.
Not all those who wander are lost.
Perfection is not attainable, but if we chase perfection we can catch excellence.
The time is now, the place is here. Stay in the present.
Peace is not something you wish for; It's something you make, something you do, something you are, and something you give away.
Peace is not absence of conflict, it is the ability to handle conflict by peaceful means.
Yesterday is the past, tomorrow is the future, today is a gift - that's why it's called the present.
Nothing in this world is worth having or worth doing unless it means effort, pain, difficulty.
Never confuse a single defeat with a final defeat.
If your mind is empty, it is always ready for anything, it is open to everything.
Be willing to be a beginner every single morning.
You have brains in your head. You have feet in your shoes. You can steer yourself any direction you choose.
You must conceive it in your heart and mind before you can receive it. If you believe then all things are possible.
Happiness is the meaning and the purpose of life, the whole aim and end of human existence.
Do what is right, not what is easy, nor what is popular.
The truly rich men are the ones who have health, loved ones and a work they love.
What you get by achieving your goals is not as important as what you become by achieving your goals.
Conquer the devils with a little thing called love.
If you love life, don't waste time, for time is what life is made up of.
Even a hare will bite when it is cornered.
Stop being tormented by everyone else's reaction to you.
True it is, we only hate those whom we do not know.
The greatest deception men suffer is from their own opinions.
The greatest value of a picture is when it forces us to notice what we never expected to see.
We take care of the future best by taking care of the present now.
Confidence breeds beauty.
He who cannot be a good follower cannot be a good leader.
Conscience is a dog that does not stop us from passing but that we cannot prevent from barking.
You may forget with whom you laughed, but you will never forget with whom you wept.
Work for something because it is good, not just because it stands a chance to succeed.
There is no self-discovery without pain and loss.
Everyone is a moon, and has a dark side which he never shows to anybody.
Persistence is very important. You should not give up unless you are forced to give up.
